CCSBot::EquipBestWeapon.comment: AI: bot picks and equips its best weapon.

CCSBot::EquipPistol.comment: AI: bot switches to its pistol secondary.

CCSPlayer_WeaponServices::SelectItem.comment: Funnel for any weapon switch (AI, pickup, buy, ammo-out, slotN).

CCSPlayer_WeaponServices::GetSlot.comment: Returns the weapon in engine slot N (0=primary, 1=pistol, 2=knife).

CCSBot::Update.comment: AI: per-tick decision entry; PathFollower + look-around + reaction + weapon.

CCSBot::Upkeep.comment: AI: per-frame view maintenance; UpdateLookAround + jitter + UpdateLookAngles.
